prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your sports team forward
items: Contact and schedule interviews with 3 team captains or coaches from local sports teams you\
Complete a comprehensive fitness assessment to establish your current athletic baseline
Create a detailed weekly schedule mapping your availability for practices, games, and team events
Purchase or gather all essential equipment and gear required for your chosen sport
Attend a team practice or game as an observer to understand team dynamics and culture
Create a formal team charter defining roles, responsibilities, and expectations for all members
